title: Dynamic Values in Monday docs
excerpt: Hi, we would like dynamic values into monday docs to include signature. Currently you can create a signature inside a monday form, but if you’d like to format the information into a monday doc, some of the information ca…

posts.author: NRSSH (Nav)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we would like dynamic values into monday docs to include signature. Currently you can create a signature inside a monday form, but if you’d like to format the information into a monday doc, some of the information can work, but the signature itself is a link, that downloads the image of the signature and then you view the signature seperately. We would like the signature to show as an image inside the monday doc instead. Additionally, we’d like more of the formatting and layout options to be exportable when you export a monday doc - at the moment there is no branding. Cheers

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be really helpful for us - we’re generating invoices using dynamic fields and would like to include signature as an option
